title: Punishment for Murder
description: Whoever commits murder shall be punished with death or imprisonment for life, and shall also be liable to fine. Murder involves intentional killing with malice aforethought.

title: Culpable Homicide Not Amounting to Murder
description: Whoever commits culpable homicide not amounting to murder shall be punished with imprisonment for life or up to 10 years and fine. Applies when death is caused without murderous intent.

title: Attempt to Murder
description: Whoever does any act with intention or knowledge likely to cause death shall be punished with imprisonment up to 10 years and fine. If hurt is caused, may extend to life imprisonment.

title: Criminal Conspiracy
description: When two or more persons agree to do an illegal act or legal act by illegal means, it constitutes criminal conspiracy punishable as if the offense was committed.

title: Acts Done by Several Persons in Furtherance of Common Intention
description: When a criminal act is done by several persons in furtherance of common intention, each person is liable as if the act was done by them alone.

title: Unlawful Assembly
description: An assembly of five or more persons with common object to commit unlawful act, use criminal force, or resist legal authority constitutes unlawful assembly.

title: Rioting
description: Whoever is guilty of rioting shall be punished with imprisonment up to 2 years or fine or both. Rioting involves use of force by unlawful assembly.

title: Voluntarily Causing Hurt
description: Whoever voluntarily causes hurt shall be punished with imprisonment up to 1 year or fine up to Rs. 1,000 or both.

title: Voluntarily Causing Hurt by Dangerous Weapons
description: Causing hurt by dangerous weapons or means shall be punished with imprisonment up to 3 years or fine or both.

title: Voluntarily Causing Grievous Hurt
description: Whoever voluntarily causes grievous hurt shall be punished with imprisonment up to 7 years and fine.

title: Assault or Criminal Force to Woman with Intent to Outrage Modesty
description: Assault or use of criminal force to woman intending to outrage her modesty shall be punished with imprisonment 1-5 years and fine.

title: Sexual Harassment
description: Physical contact and advances involving unwelcome sexual overtures, demand for sexual favours, or showing pornography constitutes sexual harassment.

title: Assault or Use of Criminal Force to Woman with Intent to Disrobe
description: Assaulting woman with intent to disrobe shall be punished with imprisonment 3-7 years and fine.

title: Kidnapping
description: Whoever kidnaps any person from India or from lawful guardianship shall be punished with imprisonment up to 7 years and fine.

title: Kidnapping with Intent to Murder
description: Kidnapping with intent that person may be murdered or subjected to grievous hurt shall be punished with life imprisonment or rigorous imprisonment up to 10 years.

title: Rape
description: Sexual intercourse without consent constitutes rape, punishable with rigorous imprisonment minimum 10 years extending to life and fine.

title: Unnatural Offenses
description: Carnal intercourse against order of nature punishable with life imprisonment or up to 10 years and fine. Partially struck down by Supreme Court.

title: Theft
description: Dishonest taking of movable property without consent constitutes theft, punishable with imprisonment up to 3 years or fine or both.

title: Theft in Dwelling House
description: Theft in dwelling house, tents or vessels shall be punished with imprisonment up to 7 years and fine.

title: Robbery
description: Theft with use of force or threat constitutes robbery, punishable with rigorous imprisonment up to 10 years and fine.

title: Dacoity
description: Robbery by five or more persons constitutes dacoity, punishable with rigorous imprisonment up to life and fine.

title: Criminal Breach of Trust
description: Dishonest misappropriation of property entrusted constitutes criminal breach of trust, punishable with imprisonment up to 3 years or fine or both.

title: Criminal Breach of Trust by Public Servant or Banker
description: Breach of trust by public servant, banker, merchant or agent shall be punished with life imprisonment or up to 10 years and fine.

title: Cheating
description: Dishonestly inducing person to deliver property or consent by deception constitutes cheating.

title: Punishment for Cheating
description: Cheating shall be punished with imprisonment up to 1 year or fine or both.

title: Cheating and Dishonestly Inducing Delivery of Property
description: Cheating and dishonestly inducing delivery of property shall be punished with imprisonment up to 7 years and fine.

title: Criminal Trespass
description: Entering property with intent to commit offense, intimidate or annoy constitutes criminal trespass, punishable with imprisonment up to 3 months or fine up to Rs. 500.

title: House Trespass
description: Criminal trespass in building used as dwelling or place of worship constitutes house trespass.

title: House Trespass to Commit Offense Punishable with Imprisonment
description: House trespass to commit offense punishable with imprisonment shall be punished with imprisonment up to 2 years and fine.

title: Forgery for Purpose of Cheating
description: Forgery intending document be used for cheating shall be punished with imprisonment up to 7 years and fine.

title: Using as Genuine a Forged Document
description: Using as genuine a forged document or electronic record constitutes offense punishable as if forging.

title: Marrying Again During Lifetime of Spouse
description: Marrying again during spouse's lifetime without divorce constitutes bigamy, punishable with imprisonment up to 7 years and fine.

title: Cruelty by Husband or Relatives
description: Cruelty by husband or relatives including dowry harassment shall be punished with imprisonment up to 3 years and fine.

title: Defamation
description: Making or publishing imputation harming reputation constitutes defamation.

title: Punishment for Defamation
description: Defamation shall be punished with imprisonment up to 2 years or fine or both.

title: Intentional Insult with Intent to Provoke Breach of Peace
description: Intentionally insulting to provoke breach of peace shall be punished with imprisonment up to 2 years or fine or both.

title: Criminal Intimidation
description: Threatening with injury to person, reputation or property constitutes criminal intimidation, punishable with imprisonment up to 2 years or fine or both.

title: Word, Gesture or Act Intended to Insult Modesty of Woman
description: Word, gesture or act insulting woman's modesty shall be punished with imprisonment up to 3 years and fine.

title: Attempting to Commit Offenses
description: Attempting to commit offense punishable with imprisonment shall be punished with up to half the maximum imprisonment for that offense.
